info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing ecommerce platform operations including products, orders, and users.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management such as listing, creation, and updates.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for order processing, tracking, and management.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account management including registration, authentication, and profiles.

post.description: This operation allows a client to create a new user account by providing the necessary user details in the request body. On success, it returns the created user information.

requestBody.description: User registration request body containing details to create a new user account

400.description: Bad request - Invalid user details provided

example.message: Provided user data failed validation checks.

409.description: Conflict - User with given details already exists

example.message: A user with the provided email already exists.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for a user
post.description: This operation initiates a new order placement for the specified user identified by userId. It returns the details of the created order upon success.

400.description: Bad request - Invalid order or userId

example.message: Order request or userId is invalid.

404.description: Not found - User does not exist

example.message: No user found with the specified ID.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific order identified by orderId. Returns the order details if found.

example.message: The provided orderId is malformed or invalid.

404.description: Not found - Order does not exist

example.message: No order found with the specified orderId.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to a user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified product and quantity to the shopping cart for the user identified by userId. The request body must contain the cart item details. Returns the updated cart response.

requestBody.description: Cart item details to be added to the user's cart

400.description: Bad request - Invalid cart item data or userId

example.message: Provided cart item details or userId are invalid.

details.issue: Product ID does not match any product

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Fetches the current shopping cart contents for the specified user identified by userId. Returns the full cart details including items and quantities.

example.message: The provided userId is invalid.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.description: Retrieve the current shipment tracking information for the specified order ID. Provides detailed updates including shipment location, status, and estimated delivery time.

200.description: Successful response with the tracking details for the given order ID.

404.description: Order not found or no tracking information available for the given order ID.

example.message: No tracking information found for orderId 'ord-7b3d8f2a'.

details.issue: Order ID does not exist or no tracking available

500.description: Internal server error while attempting to retrieve tracking information.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Create a new product entry by providing detailed product information such as name, description, price, and inventory data. Returns the created product details upon success.

requestBody.description: The product to be added including relevant details such as name, price, and category.

example.name: Wireless Headphones
example.description: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation.

400.description: Invalid product data provided in the request body.

example.message: One or more product fields are invalid or missing.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Conflict due to product already existing with the same SKU or identifier.

example.message: A product with SKU 'WH-12345' already exists.

500.description: Internal server error while attempting to add the product.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive payment status updates via webhook
post.description: Endpoint to receive asynchronous payment notifications from external payment providers. Processes webhook payloads to update payment statuses in the system.

requestBody.description: Payment webhook payload containing status update information.

example.message: The webhook payload is missing required fields or contains invalid data.

402.description: Payment required or payment could not be processed.

example.message: Payment processing failed or payment is required to complete this operation.

details.issue: Payment status indicates failure or pending payment

500.description: Server error while processing the payment webhook.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Start a new payment process by providing payment details such as amount, payment method, and order reference. Returns the payment transaction result and status.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation details including amount, currency, method, and order information.

200.description: Payment successfully initiated and response returned.

example.message: Payment request contains invalid or missing fields.

details.issue: Amount must be greater than zero

example.message: Payment was declined by the provider or additional payment is required.

500.description: Internal error occurred while initiating the payment.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway.

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier assigned by the payment gateway.

totalAmount.description: Total amount of the order before discounts.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount amount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code for the order amounts.

userId.description: Identifier for the user who placed the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Final amount to be paid after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

preferredCurrency.description: User's preferred currency code for transactions.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active.

userType.description: Type or role of the user in the system.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user information was last updated.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product.

description.example: A comfortable wireless mouse with ergonomic design.

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

stock.description: Number of items available in stock.

quantity.description: The number of units of the product ordered

price.description: Unit price of the product before any discount

discount.description: Discount applied on the unit price

finalPrice.description: Final price per unit after discount

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart

price.description: Original price per unit of the product

finalPrice.description: Price per unit after applying discount

currency.description: Currency in which prices are specified

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp indicating the last update of the tracking information

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service handling the delivery

trackingId.description: Tracking number provided by the courier

totalAmount.description: Total cost of all items in the cart before discounts

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the cart

currency.description: Currency used for all monetary values

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart

items.description: List of items currently in the cart

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid after discounts

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated

amount.description: The total amount to be paid

paymentMethod.description: Method used for payment, e.g., credit_card, paypal

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the transaction

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway processing the transaction

country.description: User's country of residence in ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 format

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: User's preferred currency in ISO 4217 format

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is currently active

userType.description: Type of user, e.g., admin, customer

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the payment was created

amount.description: The amount that was processed in the payment

orderId.description: Identifier of the order associated with the payment

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction

paymentMethod.description: The payment method used in the transaction

currency.description: Currency code in which the payment was made

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier provided by the payment gateway

status.description: Current status of the payment, e.g., completed, pending

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product was created

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

description.example: Wireless Bluetooth headphones with noise cancellation

currency.description: Currency code used for the product price

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the product details were last updated

error.description: Short description of the error type

message.description: Detailed error message explaining what went wrong

status.description: HTTP status code representing the error

path.description: Request path that caused the error

field.description: Name of the field with the issue

error.description: Short description of the server error

message.description: Detailed error message describing the server failure

status.description: HTTP status code for the server error

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the server error occurred

requestId.description: Unique identifier for the request that caused the error
